terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.intro: By participating in this Promotion, you agree to these Terms and Conditions.
terms.introText: This Promotion is organized by Rukn Al-Izdihar, [Building No. 3787, Al-Malqa, Al-Khalij District, Riyadh] ("Organiser"). This Promotion is subject to all applicable laws and regulations in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
terms.eligibilityText: This Promotion is open to all persons aged 18 years or over who are residents of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Employees of the Organiser, eCopon and their respective affiliates, subsidiaries, associate agencies, distributors, dealers, sponsors, advertising and contest agencies, and members of their immediate families are not eligible to participate in this Promotion. Organiser reserves the right to verify the eligibility of the Participants and may request such information as it considers reasonably necessary for the verification purposes. By participating in this Promotion, Participants shall be deemed to have accepted these Terms and Conditions and agreed to be bound by them.
terms.periodText: The Promotion starts from 00:00 on May 15th, 2026 until 23:59 on August 15th 2026 ("End Date"). All entries must be received by the End Date to be eligible. The Organiser shall not be responsible for any entries that are lost, late or not received for any reason. Proof of submission is not proof of receipt.
terms.howText:
a) Find the QR Code – During the Promotion Period, a QR Code will be printed on Moussy Promotional Bottles available for purchase in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. To participate, scan the code and fill in your details.

b) Increase Your Chances – If the participant enters the 7-digit code found under the bottle cap, their chances of winning will be multiplied by 10.

For example: scanning the QR Code and filling in your details gives 1 draw entry. Scanning the QR Code + entering the unique 7 digit code gives 10 draw entries.

c) Using the 7-Digit Code – Each code under the bottle cap is valid for one use only.
terms.prizesText:
Each Participant is eligible to win any of the following Prizes:
a) 50g 24K Gold Bar (Top Prize - 7 winners total)
b) 50 Sony PS5 devices
c) 100 Xiaomi Redmi iPads
d) 500 PlayStation vouchers worth $100

Each Participant may only redeem ONE (1) Prize throughout the Promotion Period. The Prizes are non-transferable and non-exchangeable for cash. Organiser reserves the right to substitute any Prize for one of equal or greater value without notice.
terms.drawText:
There shall be a total of 6 Draws during the Promotion Period:
• Draw 1 – May 31, 2026
• Draw 2 – June 14, 2026
• Draw 3 – June 28, 2026
• Draw 4 – July 12, 2026
• Draw 5 – July 26, 2026
• Draw 6 – August 16, 2026

Winners for each Draw will be announced on eCopon within 5 business days after each Draw Date. Organizer shall contact the Winners through call/text/WhatsApp message. The outcome of the Winners selected shall be final and absolute.
terms.redeemText: To redeem the Prize, Winners are required to present a valid identification card that matches the details provided at the time of entry. All Prizes must be redeemed by November 1st, 2026.
terms.privacyText: By participating, the Participant expressly consents that the Organiser shall use, process and store the Participant's personal data in accordance with the local data protection law and regulations. The Participant also consents to receiving marketing or promotional notifications from the Organiser.
terms.disclaimerText: Participant acknowledges and agrees that Organizer is not responsible for any error, omission, interruption, deletion, defect, delay, failure in operation or transmission, communications line failure, theft or destruction, unauthorized access to, or alteration of, user or member communications, or any technical malfunction which may affect the Participant's participation.
terms.generalText:
a) Organiser reserves the right to suspend, cancel or modify this Promotion at any time without prior notice.
b) Organiser reserves the right to disqualify any participant without notice if suspected of tampering.
c) By participating and accepting a Prize, the Winner agrees to allow the Organiser to use their name, images and videos for promotional purposes without additional compensation.
d) Each participant agrees to indemnify the Organiser and eCopon from any losses or damages arising from participation.
e) The Organiser's decision on all matters relating to the Promotion is final.
f) These Terms and Conditions are governed by the laws of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
